note: Patient-Zero Stage IV references for psychiatric static records. The current MVP uses three core self-report scales only: PHQ-9, GAD-7, and ISI. Other examination content is generated as MSE, risk assessment, and clinically plausible exclusionary findings.

sources.title: Instructions for Patient Health Questionnaire (PHQ) and GAD-7 Measures
Management of Insomnia Disorder - Characteristics of Instruments Measuring Global Outcomes

exclusionary_findings: TSH when fatigue or sleep symptoms are prominent
CBC if fatigue is medically unexplained
cardiopulmonary review if chest pain or dyspnea is described
sleep diary when nightmares or insomnia dominate
injury or pain review if trauma-related symptoms are physical
skin exam if washing rituals cause injury
screen for tic symptoms when clinically relevant
basic metabolic baseline if antipsychotic treatment is being considered
school or occupational collateral when available
medication, caffeine, alcohol, and substance review
